features.name: fsm_state_reg_with_reset_and_compound_condition
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit state register with reset that has conditional updates based on compound boolean conditions involving other registers

features.name: fsm_state_transition_outside_reset_branch
features.description: Code should include an FSM where state transitions occur in an else branch that is evaluated after reset, with conditions depending on internal step counters

features.name: fsm_pass_with_async2sync_dffunmap
features.description: Code should include a yosys synthesis script using fsm pass followed by async2sync and dffunmap, which exposes the reset initialization bug in multi-bit state registers
